base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemies_grunts — a character (minion) from 1991 the simpsons arcade game. Grunt enemies — Bouncer Brothers/Kabuki Master/Ninja/Drunk/Bigfoot/Bear/Zombie/Firefighter/Goon/Hazmat/Lumberjack/Bart Devil/Space Mutant/etc.. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Grunt enemies — Bouncer Brothers/Kabuki Master/Ninja/Drunk/Bigfoot/Bear/Zombie/Firefighter/Goon/Hazmat/Lumberjack/Bart Devil/Space Mutant/etc.
